command:
$script = @'
import json, urllib.request, struct, base64, os, socket, time

def cdp_get_pages():
    r = urllib.request.urlopen("http://localhost:9222/json", timeout=5)
    return json.loads(r.read())

def ws_send_recv(ws_url, msg, wait=3):
    from urllib.parse import urlparse
    u = urlparse(ws_url)
    host = u.hostname
    port = u.port or 80
    s = socket.create_connection((host, port), timeout=15)
    key = base64.b64encode(os.urandom(16)).decode()
    req = f"GET {u.path} HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: {host}:{port}\r\nUpgrade: websocket\r\nConnection: Upgrade\r\nSec-WebSocket-Key: {key}\r\nSec-WebSocket-Version: 13\r\n\r\n"
    s.sendall(req.encode())
    resp = b""
    while b"\r\n\r\n" not in resp:
        resp += s.recv(4096)
    data = msg.encode("utf-8")
    frame = bytearray([0x81])
    l = len(data)
    mask_key = os.urandom(4)
    if l < 126:
        frame.append(0x80 | l)
    elif l < 65536:
        frame.append(0x80 | 126)
        frame.extend(struct.pack(">H", l))
    frame.extend(mask_key)
    masked = bytearray(b ^ mask_key[i%4] for i,b in enumerate(data))
    frame.extend(masked)
    s.sendall(frame)
    time.sleep(wait)
    s.settimeout(5)
    all_data = b""
    try:
        while True:
            chunk = s.recv(65536)
            if not chunk: break
            all_data += chunk
            if len(chunk) < 65536: break
    except: pass
    s.close()
    # parse frames
    result = ""
    pos = 0
    while pos < len(all_data):
        if pos+2 > len(all_data): break
        b1 = all_data[pos+1] & 0x7F
        hlen = 2
        if b1 == 126: hlen = 4
        elif b1 == 127: hlen = 10
        if pos+hlen > len(all_data): break
        if b1 == 126:
            plen = struct.unpack(">H", all_data[pos+2:pos+4])[0]
        elif b1 == 127:
            plen = struct.unpack(">Q", all_data[pos+2:pos+10])[0]
        else:
            plen = b1
        payload = all_data[pos+hlen:pos+hlen+plen]
        result += payload.decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
        pos = pos+hlen+plen
    return result

pages = cdp_get_pages()
target = None
for p in pages:
    if "maps" in p["url"] and "contrib" in p["url"] and "_/js/" not in p["url"]:
        target = p
        break
if not target:
    target = pages[0]
ws = target["webSocketDebuggerUrl"]
print(f"Navigating to business.google.com/create...")
nav = json.dumps({"id":1,"method":"Page.navigate","params":{"url":"https://business.google.com/create"}})
r = ws_send_recv(ws, nav, wait=8)
print(f"Nav done")
# Now inspect the page
js = "JSON.stringify({title:document.title, url:location.href, inputs:Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input')).map(i=>({name:i.name||'',aria:i.getAttribute('aria-label')||'',type:i.type,id:i.id||'',vis:i.offsetParent!==null})).filter(x=>x.vis).slice(0,15), buttons:Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).map(b=>b.innerText.trim()).filter(t=>t.length>0&&t.length<50).slice(0,10)})"
cmd = json.dumps({"id":2,"method":"Runtime.evaluate","params":{"expression":js}})
r2 = ws_send_recv(ws, cmd, wait=2)
print(f"Page info: {r2[:800]}")
'@
$script | Out-File -FilePath 'C:\temp\cdp_nav.py' -Encoding UTF8 -Force
python C:\temp\cdp_nav.py
description: CDP - الانتقال لصفحة business.google.com/create وفحص النموذج
